title: prunus × lannesiana f. longipedunculata
intro: Prunus × lannesiana f. longipedunculata is a cultivar of the Prunus lannesiana species, a hybrid cherry blossom tree known for its stunning long-stalked flowers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Prunus × lannesiana f. longipedunculata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
